children.name: We handle the technical complexity. Your agents just search and book.
children.characters: We handle the technical complexity. Your agents just search and book.

children.name: What exactly is Maqsood Travels and who is it built for?
children.characters: What exactly is Maqsood Travels and who is it built for?

children.name: What do I need to provide to get started?
children.characters: What do I need to provide to get started?

children.name: All we need from you are your GDS API credentials — Amadeus, Sabre, or Travelport — and we handle everything else. We've already built and certified integrations with all major GDS systems and leading NDC airlines, so there's no technical work on your end. If your preferred NDC airline isn't currently in our portfolio, we'll integrate it for you at no additional charge.
